projects.description: We need a futuristic, high-converting React application with an immersive user experience, glassmorphic headers, beautiful motion sliders, and seamless customer intake pathways.
projects.aiAnalysis:
### Architecture & Technology Approach
- **Frontend**: React 19 + Tailwind CSS + Framer Motion
- **Backend**: Node.js + Express
- **Host**: Cloud Run with Nginx optimization

### Strategic Roadmaps
- **Month 1**: Design mockups, vector artwork integration, layout wireframes.
- **Month 2**: Component integration, interactive form states.
- **Month 3**: Sandbox QA, cross-device testing, SEO indexing, and direct production release.
projects.adminNotes: Admin: Welcome to our agency! Your design phase is complete and developers have begun initial coding.

messages.name: Alice Vance
messages.subject: Custom ERP Query
messages.message: Hello, looking to build an internal ERP system for our logistics company. Wondering if you have experience with shipping API integrations?

notifications.title: Project Request Received
notifications.message: Your project 'Cosmic Enterprises HQ' request has been securely recorded. Our architects are looking over specifications.
